caption: A presentation slide titled "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" focuses on the "Linde – Hampson System." The slide features a diagram of a mechanical system involving a makeup gas inlet, a valve, and a heat exchanger, with a dashed green line outlining a control volume. Text on the right provides a theoretical explanation. The sequence begins with a prompt to "Consider a control volume for this system as shown in the figure." As the sequence progresses, additional text appears detailing the quantities entering and leaving the control volume, listing "IN m @ 2" and "OUT (m - m_f) @ 1'" and "m_f @ f." The final frame introduces a thermodynamic application, stating, "Using the 1st Law, we have" followed by a mathematical equation: "m h_2 = (m - m_f) h_1 + m_f h_f." The bottom footer identifies the presenter as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay."
